name: gemini-tts
title: Gemini TTS
description: Read selected text aloud with Gemini TTS. Supports Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS Preview plus Gemini 2.5 Flash and Pro Preview TTS.
author: xianwei_zhang

commands.name: quick-read
commands.title: Quick Read Selected Text
commands.subtitle: Gemini TTS
commands.description: Read selected text, or clipboard text if no selection is available. Trigger again to stop.

commands.name: resume-reading
commands.title: Resume Last Reading
commands.subtitle: Gemini TTS
commands.description: Resume the previous reading from the next unfinished chunk

commands.name: restart-reading
commands.title: Restart Last Reading
commands.subtitle: Gemini TTS
commands.description: Restart the previous reading from the beginning

commands.name: read-with-voice
commands.title: Read with Voice Selection
commands.subtitle: Gemini TTS
commands.description: Browse Gemini voices and read selected text aloud

commands.name: select-voice
commands.title: Select Quick Read Voice
commands.subtitle: Gemini TTS
commands.description: Choose and preview the voice used by Quick Read

commands.name: speed-up-reading
commands.title: Speed up Reading
commands.subtitle: Gemini TTS
commands.description: Increase reading speed by 0.25× for the next segment.

commands.name: slow-down-reading
commands.title: Slow Down Reading
commands.subtitle: Gemini TTS
commands.description: Decrease reading speed by 0.25× for the next segment.

commands.name: playback-status
commands.title: Reading Status
commands.subtitle: Gemini TTS
commands.description: Menu-bar status of the current Gemini TTS reading with controls

preferences.name: geminiApiKey
preferences.title: Gemini API Key
preferences.description: API key from Google AI Studio; quota and billing are managed on the owning AI Studio project

preferences.name: model
preferences.title: Model
preferences.description: Gemini TTS model used for synthesis

preferences.name: defaultVoice
preferences.title: Default Voice
preferences.description: Voice used for Quick Read command

preferences.name: speakerMode
preferences.title: Speaker Mode
preferences.description: Use Gemini's multi-speaker TTS only when a transcript has exactly two clear speaker labels

preferences.name: secondaryVoiceId
preferences.title: Second Dialogue Voice
preferences.description: Gemini prebuilt voice for the second speaker when Auto Two-Speaker Dialogue is enabled

preferences.name: readingExperience
preferences.title: Reading Experience
preferences.description: Director preset used to shape Gemini TTS delivery

preferences.name: languageMode
preferences.title: Language Handling
preferences.description: Gemini TTS auto-detects language; this adds prompt guidance for language and pronunciation

preferences.name: expressiveness
preferences.title: Expressiveness
preferences.description: How much vocal contour Gemini should add before playback speed is applied

preferences.name: audioTagMode
preferences.title: Audio Tags
preferences.description: Optional Gemini audio-tag behavior for delivery cues

preferences.name: directorNotes
preferences.title: Custom Director Notes
preferences.description: Optional extra direction for tone, accent, pacing, pronunciation, or role
preferences.placeholder: Example: sound like a calm CLSCI seminar professor; slow down around article numbers and citations.

preferences.name: speechRate
preferences.title: Playback Speed
preferences.description: Playback rate applied by macOS afplay
